summary: AuthHeader builds base64("API_KEY:<key>") — a constant Basic username.
reason: intervals.icu HTTP Basic uses the literal username "API_KEY" with the personal key as the password. The generator's single-token Basic path emitted base64("<key>:") (key as username), which fails auth. The generator has no spec field for a constant Basic username.
validated_outcome: doctor + live reads succeed; 282/282 live dogfood pass.
